figures.caption: Figure 4: Comparison of trajectories of the best predictive accuracy in each generation of DRSR on Nguyen benchmarks with 𝑛noise = 20 under three loss functions: LMedAE, LMAE, and LMSE. The solid curves show the mean accuracy, and the shaded regions show the 95% bootstrap confidence intervals over 10 independent trials. The accuracy is defined as 1/(1 + LMSE (𝑓 ;Dbase)).

Figure 3: Comparison of trajectories of the best predictive accuracy in each generation of DRSR on Nguyen benchmarks with 𝑛noise = 5 under three loss functions: LMedAE, LMAE, and LMSE. The solid curves show the mean accuracy, and the shaded regions show the 95% bootstrap confidence intervals over 10 independent trials. The accuracy is defined as 1/(1 + LMSE (𝑓 ;Dbase)).

Figure 5: Evaluation metric trajectories of DRSR, SR, and MOSR on the synthetic mixture dataset. We track best fitness, accuracies on the linear and logistic components, coverage, QD-Score, and HV. The solid curves show the mean values of the corresponding metrics, and shaded regions show the 95% bootstrap confidence intervals over 10 independent trials.

Figure 1: MedAE landscapes over the coefficients for two expression structures. The top panels show the example data points and the model outputs for two selected coefficient settings. The bottom panels show contour plots of LMedAE (𝑓 ;D) on the (𝑤1,𝑤2) plane. Blue and orange squares indicate the selected settings.

Figure 6: Predictive behaviors of the top 3 expressions from DRSR, SR, and MOSR with the highest component-wise accuracies for the linear dataset Dlinear and logistic dataset Dlogistic, respectively. The expressions are selected from the final solution set of a trial, and the scatter points represent the mixture dataset Dmixed. For MOSR, the curves of the top 3 expressions on Dlogistic are not separately visible because they are identical to those on Dlinear.

Table 6: Piecewise classical mass–luminosity relations reported by Eker et al. [11]. The relations are given on the log𝑀–log𝐿 plane, with𝑀 and 𝐿 in solar units; the reported uncertainties are the coefficient errors.
Table 3: Explicit forms of the three expressions found by DRSR and shown in Figure 6 for the logistic component Dlogistic.
